overall.description: First-person exploration through a candlelit gothic stone corridor at night, showcasing high-quality game engine graphics with detailed architecture and atmospheric lighting. The camera moves steadily through the covered walkway with views of courtyards and adjacent buildings through arched openings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with gothic arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the enclosed corridor, observing the stone architecture and warm lantern light

entered.detail: repeating gothic stone arches forming the corridor structure ahead
warm orange lanterns mounted on the stone columns providing illumination
lit windows of a building visible through the arches on the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed stone corridor illuminated by warm wall lanterns. Gothic arches line the right side revealing a distant building with lit windows, while the path ahead leads deeper into the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vegetation and courtyard views

events.description: hanging vines become visible draping from the right side columns

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the corridor reveals vegetation on the right and opens to the exterior courtyard on the left

entered.detail: green ivy and vines draping down from the stone arches on the right side
open courtyard area becoming visible through the opening left wall

segments.scene_description: The corridor transitions to a semi-covered state as hanging vines appear on the right columns and the left side opens up to reveal an exterior courtyard. The camera continues walking forward through the stone walkway with the night sky becoming visible.

events.description: approaching the illuminated exit archway at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the corridor where the exit archway opens to the outside

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the end of the corridor with blue night sky visible beyond

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the colonnade, the exit archway becomes prominent ahead while the exterior courtyard is now clearly visible on the left. The hanging vines and distant building fade from view as the camera nears the open exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a gothic stone corridor that gradually opens from a narrow enclosed walkway into an expansive exterior courtyard. It begins within a confined passage illuminated by warm wall lanterns, where gothic arches on the right reveal a distant building with lit windows. As the camera advances, the corridor transitions into a semi-covered state, with hanging vines appearing on the columns and the left side opening up to expose the night sky. The scene then shifts toward the end of the colonnade, where the distant building fades from view as the exterior courtyard becomes the dominant focus. Finally, the camera moves steadily forward until the open exit archway looms prominently ahead, completing the transition into the open air.
